## About Me

**Senior Technical Writer & Documentation Architect** with 19 years building world-class documentation systems for high-stakes domains: payments, fraud prevention, financial compliance, and investment management.

### What I Build
I architect documentation systems that scale with complexity. My expertise spans:

- **API Documentation** - Enterprise-grade REST/webhook API references (Stripe/Plaid quality)
- **FinTech Domain Depth** - ACH, Fedwire, SWIFT, OFAC, BSA/AML, ISO 20022, UCITS, MiFID II
- **Docs-as-Code Pipelines** - Automated, validated, version-controlled documentation
- **Compliance & Risk** - Investment mandates, pre/post-trade workflows, regulatory frameworks
- **AI-Assisted Tools** - Building next-generation documentation with GPT-4o integration

### Companies
Fundtech, SunGard, Avaya, NICE Actimize

### Open to
- Senior Technical Writer roles at scaling tech companies
- Documentation architecture positions
- FinTech/compliance-focused companies
- Contract/freelance documentation projects

## Technical Stack

- **Documentation:** MkDocs, Sphinx, Docusaurus, GitHub Pages
- **Automation:** GitHub Actions, Python, Bash
- **Development:** Next.js, TypeScript, React
- **AI/ML:** GPT-4o, Azure Text-to-Speech
- **Quality:** Vale linting, link checking, automated validation
- **Version Control:** Git, GitHub

---

## Why This Matters

Modern documentation is **software**. It should be:
- 🔄 **Automated** - Generated, not manually maintained
- 🧪 **Tested** - Links valid, examples executable
- 📦 **Versioned** - History, rollback, branches
- ⚡ **Fast** - Deployed instantly via CI/CD
- 🎯 **Accurate** - Single source of truth

My work demonstrates all of these principles in production systems.
